YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SELECT.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SELECT.descriptio: Obtain the Ring of Seven Curses relic
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SKIP.title: Skip
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_SKIP.description: Do not select the Ring of Seven Curses, continue.
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_MODIFIER.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-SEVEN_CURSES_MODIFIER.descript: Obtain the Ring of Seven Curses relic
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.title: Ring of Seven Curses
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.descripti: Damage taken +50%, damage to non-Boss enemies -25%, [gold]Block[/gold] gained -20%, Gold gained -50%, [gold]Rest Site[/gold] HP recovery -25%, gain a [gold]Curse card[/gold] at the start of each turn, max HP -25% after killing a Boss. {Energy:energyIcons()}+1, Draw +1, [gold]Potion slots[/gold] +1, [gold]Card rewards[/gold] +1, damage to Bosses +50%, normal enemies have a chance to drop [gold]Relics[/gold], can ignore path when selecting rooms on each floor.
YUWANCARD-RING_OF_SEVEN_CURSES.additiona: [gold][Ring of Seven Curses][/gold] heal [red]15% of max HP ({ActualHeal})[/red].
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.title: Ten Year Bamboo
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.description: Gain {BlockBonus} [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of each turn. Defeating Elite enemies increases Block by 1. Defeating Bosses increases Block by 3.
YUWANCARD-TEN_YEAR_BAMBOO.flavor: Ten years of bamboo, tough and resilient.
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.title: Haotian Hammer
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.description: At the start of your turn, upgrade all [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold] in all players' hands.
YUWANCARD-HAOTIAN_HAMMER.flavor: The emperor's weapon, supreme among swords.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.title: Reincarnated Eye
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.description: At the start of your first turn each combat, choose a card from your deck to copy and add to your hand.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.flavor: With double pupils, one sees infinite possibilities.
YUWANCARD-REINCARNATED_EYE.selectionProm: Choose a card from your deck to copy
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.title: Supreme Bone
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.description: At the start of each combat, choose 2 cards from your deck and give them [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When your HP first drops below [blue]30%[/blue], instantly gain 2 Energy and draw 3 cards.
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.flavor: The Supreme Bone holds supreme power.
YUWANCARD-SUPREME_BONE.selectionPrompt: Choose 2 cards from your deck to give [gold]Exhaust[/gold]
YUWANCARD-ARROGANT_PIG.title: Arrogant Pig
YUWANCARD-ARROGANT_PIG.description: Take [blue]3[/blue] additional damage when attacked. Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage to [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies. Take [blue]25%[/blue] less damage from [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies.
YUWANCARD-ARROGANT_PIG.flavor: The arrogant pig always pays the price.
YUWANCARD-JEALOUS_PIG.title: Jealous Pig
YUWANCARD-JEALOUS_PIG.description: In each combat, when an enemy first gains a Buff power, you also gain the same power. Draw 1 additional card each turn.
YUWANCARD-JEALOUS_PIG.flavor: The jealous pig wants everything others have.
YUWANCARD-FURIOUS_PIG.title: Furious Pig
YUWANCARD-FURIOUS_PIG.description: At the start of each combat, gain {StrengthPower} [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUWANCARD-FURIOUS_PIG.flavor: The furious pig has boundless strength.
YUWANCARD-LAZY_PIG.title: Lazy Pig
YUWANCARD-LAZY_PIG.description: At the start of each turn, gain {Energy} Energy. You cannot play more than {Cards} cards per turn.
YUWANCARD-LAZY_PIG.flavor: The lazy pig prefers not to move.
YUWANCARD-GREEDY_PIG.title: Greedy Pig
YUWANCARD-GREEDY_PIG.description: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Greed[/gold] to your hand. Gold gained +50%.
YUWANCARD-GREEDY_PIG.flavor: The greedy pig always wants more.
YUWANCARD-GLUTTONOUS_PIG.title: Gluttonous Pig
YUWANCARD-GLUTTONOUS_PIG.description: You can eat your [gold]card rewards[/gold]. For every [blue]2[/blue] cards eaten, at the start of each combat gain 1 [gold]Plating[/gold] and 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUWANCARD-GLUTTONOUS_PIG.flavor: The gluttonous pig devours all rewards.
YUWANCARD-LUSTFUL_PIG.title: Lustful Pig
YUWANCARD-LUSTFUL_PIG.description: At the start of each combat, all enemies gain 2 [gold]Weak[/gold]. Enemies have a [blue]30%[/blue] chance to attack other enemies.
YUWANCARD-LUSTFUL_PIG.flavor: The lustful pig, lost in chaotic desire.
